calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Continued To Jul-01-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-25-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LAURA D. BEATON of Shute, Mihal & Weinberger, LLP, Tel No. (415) 552-7272 appearing for Plaintiff As You Sow;
Atty. STEVEN R. TEKOSKY of Tatro, Tekosky, Sadwick, LLP, Tel No. (213) 225-7171 appearing for Defendants Hormel Foods Corporation and MegaMex Goods, LLC.

RULING - The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear. Counsel made their arguments to the Court. Matter submitted. The Court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW'S Motion To Enter Consent Judgment is granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED CONSENT JUDGMENT FOR SIGNATURE. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 (302/EHG)
